assertions.text: The agent recognizes this as a request to upgrade the vendored design.md stack.
The agent performs a fast-forward-only git pull of the design.md vendor.
The agent skips the upgrade when the working tree is dirty.
The slash command invokes the design.md upgrade workflow.
The agent produces a changelog summary of what changed in the design.md vendor.
The agent updates the vendored design.md stack to the latest version.
The agent reports the upgraded vendor state and changelog.
